cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: This site uses cookies and similar technologies. Below we explain which ones and why. This text is indicative and must be reviewed by a legal advisor before final publication.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
sections.body: A cookie is a small text file a website stores in your browser. It is used, for example, to remember your preferences or to measure, in aggregate, how the site is used.

sections.heading: Necessary cookies
sections.body: Essential for the site to work. We store your language preference and your cookie consent choice. They require no consent and cannot be disabled.

sections.heading: Measurement cookies
sections.body: We use Google Analytics 4 to understand how the site is navigated in aggregate and anonymously. They are only enabled if you accept them. Until you consent, Google Analytics stays blocked via Consent Mode v2.

sections.heading: Third-party cookies
sections.body: Some embedded content (such as videos or maps) may set its own cookies when it loads. Those third parties are governed by their own privacy policies, over which we have no control.

sections.heading: Managing your consent
sections.body: You can accept or reject measurement cookies from the notice shown on entry. To change your decision later, clear this site's cookies in your browser and reload the page.

privacidad.title: Privacy policy
privacidad.intro: We process your personal data in accordance with the GDPR and Spanish data-protection law. This text is indicative and must be reviewed by a legal advisor before final publication.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: ENERGÍA Y CALOR SOLAR DEL ATLÁNTICO SL (trading as «Energía Solar Canarias»), registered at C. las Mimosas, 65, 35118 Agüimes, Las Palmas, Spain. Contact email: info@energiasolarcanarias.es. Phone: +34 623 57 47 50.

sections.heading: What data we process
sections.body: We process the data you voluntarily provide through the site's contact forms: name, email, phone and the content of your message. We also collect aggregated, anonymous navigation data via Google Analytics, only if you accept measurement cookies.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: We use your data to respond to your queries, prepare the energy-independence studies you request, and manage the commercial relationship. We do not use your data for automated decisions or profiling.

sections.heading: Legal basis
sections.body: The legal basis is your consent when submitting the form and, where applicable, the performance of a pre-contractual or contractual relationship at your request.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: We keep the data for as long as needed for the stated purpose and while legal obligations require us to retain it. After that it is deleted or anonymized.

sections.heading: Recipients
sections.body: We do not share your data with third parties except where legally required. Some technology providers (hosting, email and analytics) may process data on our behalf as processors, with the safeguards the law requires.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to info@energiasolarcanarias.es. You may also lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if you believe we process your data improperly.

terminos.title: Terms and conditions
terminos.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of this website and transactions relating to our products and services. Using the site implies knowledge and acceptance of these terms. This text is indicative and must be reviewed by a legal advisor before final publication.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: These Terms apply to this website and to transactions relating to our products and services. You may be bound by additional contracts relating to your relationship with us or to the services you receive. If any provision of those additional contracts conflicts with these Terms, the additional contracts prevail.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptance
sections.body: By accessing or using this site you agree to be bound by the conditions set out here. In some specific cases we may also ask you to accept them explicitly.

sections.heading: 3. Intellectual property
sections.body: We or our licensors own and control all copyright and other intellectual property rights in the site, as well as the data, information and resources displayed on it. Unless the content states otherwise, you are granted no licence to use, copy, reproduce, distribute, transform or commercially exploit any resource of this site without our prior written permission, except as permitted by mandatory law (such as the right to quote).

sections.heading: 4. Third-party links and content
sections.body: The site may include links to third-party sites whose content we do not control or review. Products or services on those sites are governed by their own terms. We are not responsible for their privacy practices or content, and you assume the risks associated with their use.

sections.heading: 5. Responsible use
sections.body: You agree to use the site only for its intended purposes and in accordance with the law. You must not use it to distribute malicious software, collect data in an automated way, or carry out any activity that damages or interferes with its operation, availability or accessibility.

sections.heading: 6. Warranties and liability
sections.body: The site and its content are provided «as is» and «as available» and may contain inaccuracies or errors. We do not warrant that the site will be available uninterrupted or error-free. Nothing in its content constitutes legal, financial or any other kind of advice. To the extent permitted by law, we will not be liable for direct or indirect damages arising from access to or use of the site.

sections.heading: 7. Privacy
sections.body: To use certain services we may ask you for information about yourself. You agree it will be truthful and up to date. The processing of your data is governed by our Privacy policy and our Cookie policy.

sections.heading: 8. Changes
sections.body: We may update these Terms when necessary. It is your responsibility to review them periodically. The date shown at the top is the date of the last revision, and changes take effect when published on this site. Continued use after publication implies acceptance.

sections.heading: 9. Law and jurisdiction
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any dispute is subject to the jurisdiction of the Spanish courts. If any provision is found invalid, it will be modified or removed as necessary, without affecting the rest.

sections.heading: 10. Owner and contact
sections.body: This website is owned by ENERGÍA Y CALOR SOLAR DEL ATLÁNTICO SL. You can contact us regarding these Terms at info@energiasolarcanarias.es or via the contact page.

aviso-legal.title: Legal notice
aviso-legal.intro: General terms of use of this website. This text is indicative and must be reviewed by a legal advisor before final publication.

sections.heading: Site owner
sections.body: ENERGÍA Y CALOR SOLAR DEL ATLÁNTICO SL (trading as «Energía Solar Canarias»), registered at C. las Mimosas, 65, 35118 Agüimes, Las Palmas, Spain. Contact email: info@energiasolarcanarias.es. Phone: +34 623 57 47 50.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: This site is informational, covering the self-consumption, photovoltaic installation, energy storage and energy consulting services we offer in the Canary Islands.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The contents, trademarks and graphic elements of this site belong to Energía Solar Canarias or their legitimate owners. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: We are not liable for misuse of the contents or for damages arising from access to the site. We reserve the right to modify the information without prior notice.
